excerpt: Selling digital products from Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, or Bangladesh is possible with crypto-native infrastructure that has no geographic restrictions.

content.text: You're a digital creator in Ghana with an amazing product, but you can't get paid online because of PayPal's restrictions on your country. You've tried Stripe, but it's not an option either. You're stuck between a rock and a hard place, watching your income dwindle as you wait for a solution. You're not alone. Thousands of creators worldwide face this same problem. But there's hope. With the right tools and strategies, you can start selling your digital products online and get paid without relying on PayPal or Stripe. Let's get started.
The Full List With Context

To start selling your digital products online and get paid without PayPal or Stripe, you need to follow these 5 steps: Set up a cryptocurrency payment processor like NOWPayments, which supports 300+ coins and has no KYC requirements. Create a digital product store using a platform like Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard, which provides automated delivery and transaction logs. Develop a marketing strategy to reach your target audience and promote your products. Integrate a wallet connector like Web3 Wallet Connect to facilitate easy payments. Finally, optimize your website for conversions and ensure a seamless user experience.
Why Each Item on This List Matters

Setting up a cryptocurrency payment processor is crucial because it allows you to accept payments from customers worldwide without facing restrictions. Creating a digital product store is essential for organizing and showcasing your products in a professional manner. Developing a marketing strategy is vital for reaching your target audience and promoting your products effectively. Integrating a wallet connector simplifies the payment process for customers, reducing friction and increasing conversions. Optimizing your website for conversions ensures that you maximize sales and revenue.
The Ones Most Creators Get Wrong

One common mistake creators make is thinking that cryptocurrency payments are too complex or difficult to implement. Another mistake is underestimating the importance of a good marketing strategy or overlooking the need for a professional-looking digital product store. Some creators also assume that they can simply rely on social media to promote their products and drive sales. However, a well-planned marketing strategy and a professional-looking store are essential for success in the digital market.
Don't let PayPal's restrictions hold you back from selling your digital products online.
How to Prioritise What to Implement First

If you're just starting out, it's essential to focus on setting up a cryptocurrency payment processor and creating a digital product store. These two steps will give you a solid foundation for selling your digital products online. Once you have these basics in place, you can develop a marketing strategy and integrate a wallet connector to further optimize your sales process.
Putting the List Into Action

To put these steps into action, start by researching cryptocurrency payment processors and selecting one that meets your needs. Next, create a digital product store using a platform like Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard. Develop a marketing strategy that targets your ideal audience and promotes your products effectively. Integrate a wallet connector to simplify the payment process for customers. Finally, optimize your website for conversions and ensure a seamless user experience.
